description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsGrey and black printed brassiere, has medium coverage, wire under the cups for support, sweetheart neckline, light cotton feel padding which ensures no show through tight fitting clothes, adjustable straps and adjustable single hook and eye closure at the backMaterial and Care85% polyester and 15% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
